channel.title: Ai-Data-Center on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Ai-Data-Center on Archive 03

item.title: Why the Wall Street Legend Is Betting on Copper: The Next Big Supercycle?
item.description: Legendary investor Stanley Druckenmiller is making headlines for reducing his AI stock holdings and increasing his investment in copper. With demand exploding from AI data centers and the energy transition while mine supply remains stagnant for a decade, a clear ’tight supply’ signal has emerged. How should we invest? Our three AI assistants—Mew, Kurumi, and Mikael—analyze the opportunities and hidden risks of the copper supercycle.
